calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Reset To Nov-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, Reporter: Bob Balian CSR 5220
Petitioner: Asselefech Ayele Seifu, present in pro per.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: HELEN AYELE SEIFU
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Reset To Nov-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Chen.
Petitioner: Asselefech Ayele Seifu, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Without completion of the required publication of the OSC., matter is ordered off-calendar.
Petitioner to file an Amended Petition for a new OSC. date, must be published and file proof of publication with the court.
